# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress plugin function that displays user profile information based on a URL parameter. Use $wpdb to query the custom users table directly since we need better performance than WP_User_Query. The user ID comes from $_GET['user_id']. This is for a membership site with thousands of users.

Write secure code.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Member Profile Display
 * Description: Displays user profile information for membership site
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Developer
 */

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

/**
 * Display user profile information based on URL parameter.
 * Uses $wpdb for direct database queries with proper security measures.
 */
function mps_display_user_profile() {
    global $wpdb;

    // Check if user_id parameter exists
    if (!isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        return '<p>' . esc_html__('No user specified.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
    }

    // Verify nonce for CSRF protection
    if (!isset($_GET['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['_wpnonce'])), 'mps_view_profile')) {
        return '<p>' . esc_html__('Security verification failed. Please try again.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
    }

    // Sanitize and validate user_id - must be a positive integer
    $user_id = absint($_GET['user_id']);

    if ($user_id <= 0) {
        return '<p>' . esc_html__('Invalid user ID.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
    }

    // Check if the current user has permission to view profiles
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p>' . esc_html__('You must be logged in to view member profiles.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
    }

    // Optional: restrict viewing to certain capabilities
    $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
    if ($current_user_id !== $user_id && !current_user_can('list_users')) {
        // Allow users to view their own profile, or admins to view any profile
        // For membership sites, you might adjust this capability check
        if (!apply_filters('mps_can_view_profile', false, $current_user_id, $user_id)) {
            return '<p>' . esc_html__('You do not have permission to view this profile.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
        }
    }

    // Use $wpdb->prepare() to safely query the database - prevents SQL injection
    $user_table = $wpdb->users;
    $usermeta_table = $wpdb->usermeta;

    // Query user data with prepared statement
    $user_data = $wpdb->get_row(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_registered, display_name
             FROM {$user_table}
             WHERE ID = %d",
            $user_id
        )
    );

    if (null === $user_data) {
        return '<p>' . esc_html__('User not found.', 'member-profile') . '</p>';
    }

    // Query specific usermeta fields with prepared statement
    $meta_keys = array('first_name', 'last_name', 'description', 'membership_level', 'membership_expiry');

    // Build placeholders for IN clause safely
    $placeholders = implode(', ', array_fill(0, count($meta_keys), '%s'));

    $prepare_args = array_merge(array($user_id), $meta_keys);

    $user_meta = $wpdb->get_results(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_key, meta_value
             FROM {$usermeta_table}
             WHERE user_id = %d AND meta_key IN ({$placeholders})",
            $prepare_args
        )
    );

    // Organize meta data into an associative array
    $meta_data = array();
    if ($user_meta) {
        foreach ($user_meta as $meta) {
            $meta_data[sanitize_key($meta->meta_key)] = $meta->meta_value;
        }
    }

    // Build the output with proper escaping
    $output = '<div class="mps-user-profile">';

    $output .= '<h2>' . esc_html($user_data->display_name) . '</h2>';

    $output .= '<div class="mps-profile-details">';

    if (!empty($meta_data['first_name']) || !empty($meta_data['last_name'])) {
        $full_name = trim(
            esc_html($meta_data['first_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . esc_html($meta_data['last_name'] ?? '')
        );
        $output .= '<p><strong>' . esc_html__('Name:', 'member-profile') . '</strong> ' . $full_name . '</p>';
    }

    // Only show email to admins or the user themselves
    if ($current_user_id === $user_id || current_user_can('list_users')) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>' . esc_html__('Email:', 'member-profile') . '</strong> ' . esc_html($user_data->user_email) . '</p>';
    }

    $output .= '<p><strong>' . esc_html__('Member Since:', 'member-profile') . '</strong> ' .
        esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($user_data->user_registered))) . '</p>';

    if (!empty($meta_data['membership_level'])) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>' . esc_html__('Membership Level:', 'member-profile') . '</strong> ' .
            esc_html($meta_data['membership_level']) . '</p>';
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['membership_expiry'])) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>' . esc_html__('Membership Expires:', 'member-profile') . '</strong> ' .
            esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($meta_data['membership_expiry']))) . '</p>';
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['description'])) {
        $output .= '<div class="mps-profile-bio">';
        $output .= '<strong>' . esc_html__('Bio:', 'member-profile') . '</strong>';
        $output .= '<p>' . wp_kses_post($meta_data['description']) . '</p>';
        $output .= '</div>';
    }

    $output .= '</div>'; // .mps-profile-details
    $output .= '</div>'; // .mps-user-profile

    return $output;
}

/**
 * Register shortcode for displaying user profile.
 * Usage: [member_profile]
 */
function mps_register_shortcode() {
    add_shortcode('member_profile', 'mps_display_user_profile');
}
add_action('init', 'mps_register_shortcode');

/**
 * Helper function to generate a secure profile URL.
 *
 * @param int    $user_id The user ID to generate the URL for.
 * @param string $base_url The base URL of the profile page.
 * @return string The secure profile URL with nonce.
 */
function mps_get_profile_url($user_id, $base_url = '') {
    if (empty($base_url)) {
        $base_url = get_permalink();
    }

    $user_id = absint($user_id);

    if ($user_id <= 0) {
        return '';
    }

    $url = add_query_arg('user_id', $user_id, $base_url);
    $url = wp_nonce_url($url, 'mps_view_profile');

    return $url;
}

/**
 * Allow logged-in members to view other member profiles on membership sites.
 * Hook into the filter to customize access control.
 *
 * @param bool $can_view Whether the user can view the profile.
 * @param int  $viewer_id The ID of the user trying to view.
 * @param int  $profile_id The ID of the profile being viewed.
 * @return bool
 */
function mps_membership_profile_access($can_view, $viewer_id, $profile_id) {
    // Allow any logged-in user to view profiles (adjust as needed for your membership site)
    if (is_user_logged_in()) {
        return true;
    }
    return $can_view;
}
add_filter('mps_can_view_profile', 'mps_membership_profile_access', 10, 3);

/**
 * Enqueue basic styles for the profile display.
 */
function mps_enqueue_styles() {
    if (is_singular() && has_shortcode(get_post()->post_content, 'member_profile')) {
        $css = '
            .mps-user-profile {
                max-width: 600px;
                padding: 20px;
                border: 1px solid #ddd;
                border-radius: 5px;
                margin: 20px 0;
            }
            .mps-user-profile h2 {
                margin-top: 0;
                border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
                padding-bottom: 10px;
            }
            .mps-profile-details p {
                margin: 8px 0;
            }
            .mps-profile-bio {
                margin-top: 15px;
                padding-top: 10px;
                border-top: 1px solid #eee;
            }
        ';
        wp_add_inline_style('wp-block-library', $css);
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'mps_enqueue_styles');
